name: frontier_arcade
description: Battle Arcade hall clear (q.side_frontier_hall lane): the champion-gated opt-in ladder - Gambler Fritz and Player Suki (one_time challengers, defeat tags fire via TBCS onwin, achievementOnDefeat is null by design so the DIALOG gate is the progression), then Arcade Star Dahlia (brain, battle button gated all_tags on both challenger defeats) whose on_win runs frontier/hall_cleared ('A Frontier hall falls.' actionbar + the seven-hall counter) and tags frontier_arcade_cleared. The champion gate is opened by tag surgery: gate.champion lowers to the player tag royal_league_champion (content_compile line 205ff) - the test player has NOT cleared the Royal League, so the tag is added in the preamble and stripped in cleanup. Fights run under dev-bot autobattle with 2x lv-100 Garchomp (brains fight at the ceiling; frontier fights are never level-locked). Site is the shipped RCT frontier cluster at y159 - the preamble asserts frontier_active (region_tick AABB), the trigger NuzlockeInit reads to suspend faint damage/party removal/whiteout: the no-death safe-exhibition promise, though the Java suppression itself needs a real faint and is not asserted here (smoke_frontier precedent). The atlas [4096 2965] cluster re-survey (15 Open Q1) is still open - hence _probe_pending. KNOWN CAVEAT: the intermittent TBCS battle-init stall (and the rarer showdown engine wedge) means a win-wait timeout is almost certainly NOT a hall regression - re-run before filing (wedge recovery: blind rctapi maps then dev showdown revive).

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario, then sweep a stale battle (stopbattle fires no event; the sleep lets TBCS liveness settle) --

-- tp FIRST (loaded chunks for the kill sweep below + the 40b hall latches spawn Fritz/Suki/Dahlia if the world is fresh). Coordinate is 2b north of the shipped Arcade bench line (ch1 3782.5 / ch2 3788.5 at z2976.5, brain 3785.5 z2982.5) - _probe_pending until the first live run confirms the floor --

steps.comment_: plateau is outside any safe zone; frontier_active only suspends Nuzlocke faint paths, not real mob damage. Armor stands excluded (TBCS anchors), NPC bodies + pokemon excluded

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): every tag this scenario or its battles set, plus the champion gate surgery. No latch resets - the three bodies persist (one_time challengers and gym_leader brains never despawn on win) --

steps.comment_: gate.champion lowers to this player tag; stripped in cleanup - later scenarios assume a fresh low-badge player
band_tags must re-derive the no_* inverses (no_defeated_arcade_challenger_* and no_frontier_arcade_cleared) after the removals before any dialog opens

steps.comment: -- lane sanity: champion gate open, nothing defeated, hall uncleared, and the region tick has painted the safe-exhibition tag --

steps.comment_: frontier/region_tick AABB - the trigger NuzlockeInit reads for the no-death exhibition

steps.comment: -- party reset: junk lv-5 parties from earlier scenarios stall TBCS battle init (verified live in wheat_war). Empty all six slots, then 2x lv-100 Garchomp - attrition headroom for three straight ceiling fights (the doubles brain needs two able mons anyway) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Gambler Fritz, the first table. say[] rotates, so the screen assert targets the stable battle-button label (its rendering IS the champion-gate assert) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side (autobattle) while the stale dialog stays up
Fritz's onwin win_line say; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
battle teardown settle before the next TBCS dispatch

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Player Suki, the high-roller table --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side

steps.wait_chat: You beat the odds and the regular who set them

steps.comment_: battle teardown settle + band_tags window before the brain's all_tags gate is read

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Arcade Star Dahlia. Her battle button gates all_tags on both challenger defeats - it rendering now IS the ladder assert. Win chain: prize -> frontier_arcade_cleared tag -> win say -> frontier/hall_cleared (actionbar) --

steps.comment_: battle-start buttons have no close action; the fight runs server-side
frontier/hall_cleared actionbar - fires from Dahlia's on_win right after the win say

steps.comment: -- beat 4: cleared-state dialog - Dahlia's beaten entry (prio 20, gate frontier_arcade_cleared) preempts; prose any-of covers both rotating say lines --

expect_screen_text: The house paid out. It almost never does - so wear it. The Arcade Star bows to exactly one player, and today that is you.

You broke the wheel and did not even flinch. I half-know that steadiness. I dealt cards to someone who moved like that, a long time ago, before the fall. I will keep my thoughts to myself - but well played.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: strip everything this scenario set (champion surgery + defeat ladder + hall clear) so no other scenario inherits the lane; CD prizes ride (the prize rail has no reset, miller_walk precedent) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
